submitted_payload.name: Ralph Workflow
submitted_payload.description: Free open-source AI coding workflow system for developers who want unattended plan-build-verify loops instead of a raw chat session.

why_this_action: Codeberg adoption is still flat, so another fresh developer-facing directory with a working public submit API is higher leverage than more internal drafting.
MadeWithStack was not yet present in outreach-log.md, so this expands distribution instead of duplicating an in-flight lane.
The submit surface exposed a real public POST API and accepted a Codeberg-primary payload with a 201 response.
The listing path keeps Codeberg as the primary destination and preserves GitHub only as a secondary mirror context.
expected_outcome: Qualified developers discover Ralph Workflow through a new reviewed developer-product directory that points directly to the Codeberg primary repo.
replacement_condition: If there is no live MadeWithStack listing or referral evidence by 2026-06-06, treat this as pending-only and use the next fresh-action slot on another untouched executable directory or demand-capture lane.
